query:
UPDATE point_transactions 
SET expiresAt = DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 3 MONTH), 
    remainingAmount = amount,
    expired = CASE WHEN DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
WHERE type = 'earn' AND expiresAt IS NULL;

UPDATE line_point_transactions 
SET expiresAt = DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 3 MONTH), 
    remainingAmount = amount,
    expired = CASE WHEN DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
WHERE type = 'earn' AND expiresAt IS NULL;
